title: pelargonium × ursinum
intro: Pelargonium × ursinum, also known as bear's trumpet or bear's ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × ursinum include reducing stress and anxiety, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from cold and flu symptoms. Pelargonium × ursinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
